title: helianthemum thymifolium var. laeve
intro: Helianthemum thymifolium var. laeve, also known as rock rose, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for different herbal preparations to suit various needs.
